title: Executive and operating rights not included
doc_html:
§81.  Executive and operating rights not included

The owner of a mineral royalty has no executive rights; nor does he have the right to conduct operations to explore for or produce minerals.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §81, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
doc_text:
§81.  Executive and operating rights not included
The owner of a mineral royalty has no executive rights; nor does he have the right to conduct operations to explore for or produce minerals.
Acts 1974, No. 50, §81, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
